a: Enhance your iPad app’s user experience by supporting drawing, handwriting, and other features of Apple Pencil.

t: Handling double taps from Apple Pencil
a: Detect and respond to double taps a person makes on Apple Pencil.
Detect and respond to squeezes a person makes on Apple Pencil Pro.

t: Playing haptic feedback in your app
a: Provide tactile feedback when people perform certain actions in your app.
